surge.text: Heads up: the Improbability Drive is surging. For the next few minutes, unlikely things are {n:2-40} times more likely. Ride it out, or vent the surplus?

surge-wonder.text: Surge complete. Improbably, every light ahead turned green, the perfect song came on, and the crew all thought of the same joke simultaneously. Cherish this.

surge-weird.text: Surge complete. Side effects: the cup holder now holds cups slightly better than physics allows, and Marvin briefly felt joy. He has asked us never to speak of it.

vent.text: Surplus improbability vented safely into the atmosphere. Somewhere downwind, a fish is about to win a modest lottery. Godspeed, fish.
